summary: Completed comprehensive testing of M5 Finance Module. All backend APIs passing (31/31 tests). Frontend fully functional with all pages working correctly for Admin role.
passed_tests: GET /api/finance/stats - Finance overview stats (receivables, payables, cash/bank balance)
GET /api/finance/accounts - Lists financial accounts with current balance
POST /api/finance/accounts - Creates cash/bank accounts
PUT /api/finance/accounts/{id} - Updates account name, opening balance, active status
DELETE /api/finance/accounts/{id} - Deletes accounts without payments
GET /api/finance/invoices - Lists invoices with filters (direction, status, project)
POST /api/finance/invoices - Creates Issued (Sales) and Received (Bills) invoices
GET /api/finance/invoices/{id} - Gets invoice details with lines and allocations
PUT /api/finance/invoices/{id} - Updates draft invoice header
PUT /api/finance/invoices/{id}/lines - Updates invoice lines with totals recalculation
POST /api/finance/invoices/{id}/send - Sends draft invoice (status -> Sent/Overdue)
POST /api/finance/invoices/{id}/cancel - Cancels invoice (blocked if has allocations)
DELETE /api/finance/invoices/{id} - Deletes draft invoices only
GET /api/finance/payments - Lists payments with filters (direction, account)
POST /api/finance/payments - Creates Inflow/Outflow payments
GET /api/finance/payments/{id} - Gets payment with allocations
DELETE /api/finance/payments/{id} - Deletes payments without allocations
POST /api/finance/payments/{id}/allocate - Allocates payment to invoices
Invoice status auto-updates to PartiallyPaid when partial payment allocated
Invoice status auto-updates to Paid when full payment allocated
Allocation validation: cannot exceed payment amount
Allocation validation: cannot exceed invoice remaining amount
Allocation validation: direction must match (Inflow->Issued, Outflow->Received)
GET /api/finance/enums - Returns all finance-related enums
Frontend: Finance Overview page with 4 stat cards and quick links
Frontend: Financial Accounts page with CRUD dialog
Frontend: Invoices page with filters, search, table navigation
Frontend: Invoice Editor with line items, totals sidebar, send/cancel actions
Frontend: Payments page with filters, create dialog, allocate dialog
critical_code_review_comments: Role-based access correctly implemented - Admin/Owner/Accountant have full finance access
Invoice calculations correctly compute subtotal, VAT, and total
Account balances correctly computed from opening balance + inflows - outflows

success_rate.backend: 100% (31/31 tests passed, 2 skipped for missing technician user)

seed_data_creation: Backend tests create TEST-* prefixed invoices and payments with unique IDs. Cleanup removes test data after each run. Existing seed data: 2 accounts (Company Bank, Main Cash), 1 paid invoice (INV-0001 €8,400), multiple payments.
context_for_next_testing_agent: M5 Finance Module fully implemented and tested. Key flows: 1) Financial Accounts CRUD (Cash/Bank), 2) Invoices: Create -> Add lines -> Send -> Pay/Cancel, 3) Payments: Record -> Allocate to invoices. Invoice status auto-updates (Draft->Sent->PartiallyPaid->Paid or Overdue). Allocations validate: amount <= payment available, amount <= invoice remaining, direction match (Inflow for Issued invoices, Outflow for Received bills). Default currency EUR, VAT 20%.

test_classes: TestInvoices - Invoice CRUD, send, cancel, delete
TestPaymentAllocation - Payment to invoice allocation with validations

pages_tested: FinanceOverviewPage - Stats cards, quick links, navigation
InvoicesPage - Invoice list with filters, search
InvoiceEditorPage - Invoice form with lines, totals
PaymentsPage - Payment list, create dialog, allocate dialog

invoice_workflow: Add line items (lines update triggers totals recalculation)
Send invoice (Draft -> Sent or Overdue if past due date)
Allocate payments (updates status to PartiallyPaid or Paid)
payment_allocation_rules: Inflow payments allocate to Issued (Sales) invoices
Outflow payments allocate to Received (Bills) invoices
Cannot allocate more than payment available amount
Cannot allocate more than invoice remaining amount
